headline: ‘A Lot of Leeway’: SpaceX’s High-Grade Debt Brings Out Skeptics
summary: (Bloomberg) -- When Moody’s Ratings first evaluated Nvidia Corp. almost a decade ago, it settled on a Baa1 investment-grade rating, taking comfort in its relatively light debt load and more than $1 billion of free cash flow after 16 years as a public company.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX Falls for Third Day, Erases $600 Billion in Market ValueStocks Fall as SpaceX’s Rout Offsets US-Iran Hopes: Markets WrapIran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to OpenUS and Iran Make ‘Progress’ in T
